title: huperzia haitensis
intro: Huperzia haitensis, also known as Haitian firmoss or Quebec fir, is a species of club moss in the family Huperziaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral, antioxidant, and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and potentially helping to prevent or treat neurodegenerative diseases such as Alzheimer's. Huperzia haitensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including extracts, capsules, and teas, although the efficacy and safety of these preparations have not been extensively scientifically studied.
